name: jkpark-claude-plugin
description: Personal Claude Code plugin. Skills: idea-refiner (iterative Korean Q&A that turns a vague idea into a buildable spec), tech-blog-writer (research a topic/article and publish an image-rich, junior-friendly Korean tech blog post as HTML), obs-html (interview the user on length and requirements, then write an image-rich Korean HTML document and file it into the Obsidian vault via the obs skill), and analyze-image (look at an image the user wants analyzed without making them mention the clipboard — checks the macOS clipboard first by default). Agent: korean-reviewer (proofreads generated Korean documents for unnatural phrasing). Hook: auto-suggests korean-reviewer after .md/.html/.pptx docs are written. Also ships an opt-in animated emoji status line (statusline/) that shows working 🤖🧠 vs idle 😴💤 — copy in and configure your own settings.json.
